item.title: It's an unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
convenient
spider cream??
destroy the evidence
i'm not a fan of screaming
they own the street now
why does the sock have eyes
his name is Giancarlo Esposito
i cannot tell a lie.. i did
that's always the best segment
i was alive for this peak at least (1991)
mmm hmm
the ultimate combo
that's how you're supposed to walk around museums
she did it again
we've all googled these before
wow. impressive though that he has explored so much
that’s all for me, have a great night gang!!

angy

guy was fucking down to bone.
From the Forest owo
he has been spotted!
Hi Miso
spinn
O-O

item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: The Girl With The Green Eyes....
item.description: Trivia: IT WAS ORIGINALLY WRITTEN AS AN 1890s WESTERN. Gary Goldman and David D. Weinstein penned a script together about a cowboy in Chinatown in 1899. The Jack Burton in Goldman and Weinstein's version was an amazing gunman who could shoot the eyes out of a kite in the sky but couldn't hit anybody in a fight. Veteran "script doctor" W.D. Richter (producer/director of The Adventures of Buckaroo Banzai Across the 8th Dimension) came in for a rewrite, changing it to modern times and using Rosemary's Baby as a guide. "I believed if, like in Rosemary's Baby, you presented the foreground story in a familiar context—rather than San Francisco at the turn-of-the-century, which distances the audience immediately—and just have one simple remove, the world underground, you have a much better chance of making direct contact with the audience," Richter explained. Richter wrote his version in 10 weeks.

item.title: The misinformation is KILLING US PLEASE HELP
item.description:
I'm not Erin. Go support Erin. https://www.erininthemorning.com/p/debunked-misleading-nyt-anti-trans
Erin Reed: https://twitter.com/ErinInTheMorn/status/1753416419700580597 Julia Serano: https://x.com/JuliaSerano/status/1753456632296796420?s=20 Evan Urquhart: https://twitter.com/assignedmedia/status/1753421168000881112 https://www.assignedmedia.org/breaking-news/pamela-paul-shows-opinion-is-opinion-is-opinion Quinn McLamore: https://twitter.com/GhawinRiver/status/1753466328457908617 Jack Turban: https://twitter.com/jack_turban/status/1753459496226288053 Zinnia Jones: https://twitter.com/ZJemptv/status/1753451711039951110 ____ This is the kind of stuff that gets queer people killed. I've found this video series that just dismantles this stuff an more by Caelan Conrad. Warming, these are long videos and extremely hard to watch because it exposes the people caught up in the gender critical movement for what they are Gender critical: recruitment https://youtu.be/pwI6py78gsI?si=howLEFGBaEXnkoPV Gender critical: conversion therapy https://youtu.be/nBbOw_K6K5Q?si=4tA20l2vROWdCkMx Gender critical: fascism https://youtu.be/BIhwmNGIdo8?si=2c4g6QeVSl7Si25h What is a groomer? https://youtu.be/9c6shP-NcfE?si=TEuqiVPQ0MK_vYqs Drop the T: the deadly consequences of that respectability politics https://youtu.be/6i91PzpWDAM?si=wcBzSGQTWH363aHI
item.dc:creator: chaosbuni

item.title: Meme Dump 5 out of 200
item.description:
Hi ~ we're back !
To everyone that's new here
Cuz you know
I've been doing this for almost a week now
Which is like
A super bit commitment
I am cleaning out
My 11k+ meme folder
That I've had
Since 2017
So some of these memes
Are pre-pendemic
And nor "zoomer" humor
But let's just enjoy
The meme dump
And forget
About our problems
For 50 images ♡
It tells me to write a description
For every post
And my brain is small
So I've just been
Typing what ever
Is on my mind
If you haven't noticed
The healer memes
This was a phase
Even though
I'm still a healer main
On many video games
I think during this time
I was big mad
With healing people
Was in my healer villain era
Definitely apart of my lore now
Yesterday I didn't want to cook dinner
So I had "girl dinner"
Which basically means I
Scrummaged through my house
Grabbing handfuls of whatever food
Today
I'm making perogies from scratch
With sausage and caramelized onions
It's my friends bday today
And we're getting together to play
Jackboxs and other games
Then after we're going to watch
Helluva Boss
I'm excited !
Happy Saturday everyone ♡ thank you for joining me on another 11k folder phone cleaning dump. Be kind to yourself and others while the world is ugly ♡
item.dc:creator: Orangefish

item.dc:creator: bexxMaker

item.title: I won an award for my 2023 restoration work
item.description:
I was able to complete over 370 stones between May and October of 2023 (most of them are in my post history) and I was super proud of the work I did, but also super broke because my work is 100% volunteer and I provide all my own materials and supplies. But they were offering gift cards for more D/2 so I couldn't pass it up and here we are.
Here's some of my favorites.
Love Barbara.
item.dc:creator: Springchikun

item.title: Kudlow on FOX: "We had a blowout jobs report...many of my conservative friends are trying to drill holes in this report. But you know what? It is what it is. It's a very strong report. Not every economic stat should be viewed through political lens”
